name: iPhone 15
description: The iPhone 15 features a powerful A16 Bionic chip, advanced dual-camera system, stunning Super Retina XDR display, and all-day battery life.

name: Samsung S24
description: Samsung Galaxy S24 offers a premium design, AI-powered features, excellent cameras, and a smooth AMOLED display.

name: AirPods Pro
description: AirPods Pro delivers immersive sound, active noise cancellation, transparency mode, and a comfortable fit.

name: Apple Watch
description: Apple Watch Series 9 helps you stay connected, track workouts, monitor health metrics, and manage daily activities.
